title: Missing Recipes
description: Adds a couple of useful recipes
body:
This datapack adds some crafting recipes, which are balanced around vanilla progression.
The currently included recipes are:
- Cobweb crafting
- Cobweb to String
- Wool to String
- Rotten Flesh to Leather smoking/campfire
- Totem Of Undying crafting
- Enchanted Golden Apple crafting
